changelog: 🎬 Episodes panel now labels entries as Video 1, Video 2... in series order with Search + Watched/Unwatched filters 📺
🕒 Fixed Recently Played sometimes not showing the video you just watched 🎥
🖼️ Floating (PiP) video window now has working Previous/Next buttons ⏮️⏭️
🛑 Fixed floating (PiP) window's Close button not fully stopping playback ✅
📂 Moved Playlists card to 2nd position in Explore 🎵
🎧 Fixed Audio Focus and Crossfade settings not working 🎚️
🐞 Bug fixes, stability improvements and minor UI polish 🛠️
